report_meta.title: AlphaForge v0.26 — Cost-Aware Labeling, Feature Selection, Confidence Threshold

experiment_design.hypothesis: Cost-aware labeling, feature reduction, and confidence thresholding reduce overfit and improve model honesty on synthetic data
experiment_design.control: Baseline run with 60 features, gross-R labels, no confidence threshold

config.features: core (28 columns: returns, volatility, atr, momentum, breakout)

directional_verdict.synthetic_limit: Accuracy and Sharpe cannot improve on random walk data
directional_verdict.next_data_needed: Real market data for economic metric validation

changes_applied.name: Cost-Aware Labeling
changes_applied.description: Label selection uses net_long/net_short instead of gross returns. Round-trip cost = fee_pct * 2 / 100
changes_applied.new_behavior: max(net_long, net_short, 0) determines label, where net = gross - round_trip_cost
changes_applied.impact: NO_TRADE increased from 25 to 1241-1622. Model no longer trades marginal edges.

changes_applied.name: Feature Group Selection
changes_applied.description: compute_features() accepts feature_groups parameter; --features CLI flag filters groups
changes_applied.old_behavior: All 60 features always computed, --features flag ignored
changes_applied.new_behavior: --features 'returns,volatility,atr' computes only those groups via GROUP_PREFIX_MAP filtering
changes_applied.impact: 28-core-feature run completed in 5.6s vs 34.2s baseline (6x faster). Same structural quality.

changes_applied.name: Confidence Threshold Filtering
changes_applied.description: CONFIDENCE_THRESHOLD=0.55 forces low-confidence predictions to NO_TRADE (class 2)
changes_applied.old_behavior: np.argmax(y_pred_prob, axis=1) without any confidence filter
changes_applied.new_behavior: np.argmax then override to NO_TRADE where max_prob < 0.55. Tracks low_conf_count
changes_applied.impact: Exposure dropped from 99.13% to 43.44-56.73%. Model now defaults to NO_TRADE when uncertain.

changes_applied.name: Cost Decomposition in Metrics
changes_applied.description: fee_pct, round_trip_cost_bps, round_trip_cost_r added to output metrics
changes_applied.old_behavior: No cost information in metrics output
changes_applied.new_behavior: cost_decomposition section with fee_pct, round_trip_cost_bps, round_trip_cost_r
changes_applied.impact: Pipeline now reports fee structure alongside performance metrics

feature_groups.group_prefix_map: See pipeline.py GROUP_PREFIX_MAP for full feature-to-group mapping

remaining_issues.title: Sharpe uses gross R, not net R
remaining_issues.description: r_values in WFV still use gross returns (best_r = long_gross/short_gross). Net R not plumbed through.
remaining_issues.impact: Sharpe ratio 40.81 identical across all runs — not reflecting cost-aware changes
remaining_issues.fix: Change generate_labels() to return net_r instead of gross_r, or add net_r_values as additional return

remaining_issues.title: Synthetic data is random walk
remaining_issues.description: Random walk with drift has zero predictable structure. All features on synthetic data are noise.
remaining_issues.impact: Overfit gap cannot drop below HIGH. Model necessarily overfits to noise patterns.
remaining_issues.fix: Upgrade to GARCH(1,1) volatility clustering + regime-switching trend for realistic synthetic data

remaining_issues.title: MetaLabelingTrainer not integrated
remaining_issues.description: MetaLabelingTrainer exists in xgb_trainer.py but is not wired into the training pipeline.
remaining_issues.impact: Two-stage meta-labeling (primary direction + binary confidence) not tested
remaining_issues.fix: Integrate MetaLabelingTrainer as optional --meta-labeling flag in train.py main()

remaining_issues.title: Feature family ablation not run
remaining_issues.description: Individual feature families not tested in isolation. 28-feature set is heuristic, not evidence-based.
remaining_issues.impact: Unknown which families contribute positively vs negatively on synthetic or real data
remaining_issues.fix: Run 9 individual WFV tests (one per family) and rank by val_accuracy, stability, r_expectancy

remaining_issues.title: Optuna tuning not validated with cost-aware objective
remaining_issues.description: Optuna tuner exists but default objective is mlogloss. NSGA-II with Sharpe exists but untested.
remaining_issues.impact: Hyperparameters are LOCKED_INITIAL_BASELINE, not empirically tuned for cost-aware objective
remaining_issues.fix: Run Optuna with multi-objective (Sharpe, PF) on cost-aware labels with nested WFV

git_commits.message: feat: #alphaforge v0.26 cost-aware labeling, feature selection, confidence threshold
chore: #alphaforge v0.26 ACCP report for cost-aware labeling, feature selection, confidence threshold
